def positive_enumerate_on_range_len():
    rule_id = "enumerate_on_range_len"
    family = "hot_path"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "enumerate(range(len(...))) style loops that add indexing ceremony without extra value."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
